name: irfanabduhu
description: Creative writing and reading tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: fablesmith
plugins.description: Generate creative fiction in markdown, mimicking specific authors' styles. Includes /tale (short story), /tales (story collection), /saga (novella), /novel (full novel), /play (theatrical play), /verse (poetry collection), and /fable (fable/parable) commands.

plugins.name: readweave
plugins.description: Distill books, web writings, video, audio, documentation, and discussions into elegant presentations and reading guides. Includes /read, /master, /study, /narrate, /paper, /survey, /digest, /crawl, /research, /watch, /playlist, /listen, /podcast, /docs, and /thread commands.
